body.title: Auto-close low-risk tickets meeting all safety criteria
body.description:
922 awaiting-validation tickets can't all get human eyes. Low-risk tickets meeting all criteria should auto-close; only risky ones need CC review. Structurally drains the backlog rather than just renaming it.

**Affected files:** agent_datacenter/lab/claudecode/cc_queue.py (add auto-validate check on status transition to awaiting_validation); agent_datacenter/lab/claudecode/github_sync.py (propagate auto-close)
**Design rules:** all 5 criteria must be met — any failure keeps ticket in awaiting_validation for human review; criteria are conservative by design
**Scope boundary:** in scope: auto-close when ALL: size S or M, no HIGH-inertia files in diff (check against inertia_map.py or SCOPE_GUARD log), pe_chain commit_result != skipped, test suite passed (from test_result field), zero SCOPE_GUARD trips on this ticket. Out of scope: auto-closing L/XL tickets, retroactive bulk-close of existing 922 backlog (separate pass), changing what CC does to manually close tickets.
**Test plan:** unit test each criterion independently; integration test that a synthetic ticket meeting all 5 auto-closes; test that a ticket failing any one criterion stays in awaiting_validation.
